message:
✨ Add --allowed-origins CLI flag to kc-agent (#1384)

Users can now pass additional WebSocket origins via CLI flag
instead of only the KC_ALLOWED_ORIGINS env var. Both sources
are additive on top of the built-in defaults.

Usage: kc-agent --allowed-origins "https://my-console.example.com"

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
